Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}It's a painful decision, but it's yours to make.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}But... it's impossible to defeat Nyx.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}We'll go as far as we can. We have to try.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}You're the only one saying it's impossible. Personally, I don't care if it is.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}It's almost midnight, so I'll make this short.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}I should tell you where to find Nyx.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}She's at the very top of Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}On the Promised Day, you have to make your way to the top of the tower.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}It's exactly one month from tomorrow.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}On that day, Nyx will descend to Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Tartarus is a gigantic rift in the night sky. It acts as a beacon to guide Nyx.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}With the Appriser's arrival, Nyx learns that the way has been prepared, and she begins her descent.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}And with her, she brings the demise.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}That explains why it's called the Tower of Demise.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}So what you're saying is we can fight Nyx if we reach the top?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}After today, you'll be fighting against eternal despair.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}I've said it before, but Nyx can't be defeated.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}When you come face to face with her, you'll finally understand why.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}And then you'll realize exactly what you're trying to stand against.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}We understand. You don't need to keep telling us.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}One month from now—January 31st. We won't forget.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}{f 4 23 0 221 10 25 25}I want to leave you while I'm still in this form.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}Aigis... I'm sorry for all the pain and suffering I put you through.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}I won't forget that you were my enemy... and my friend.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}This is probably the last time we'll get to see each other like this.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}But I'll always be watching over you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}Best wishes in the coming year.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}That's what you say on New Year's Eve, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}We have one month until January 31st.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}We'll get through this together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I've made an important decision[n]together with my friends.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel an unbreakable bond with them...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Fool Social Link reached its maximum level! You can now fuse {f 0 1 35}Susano-o{f 0 1 27}, the raging god![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We all share the same goal...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Our relationship has grown stronger. Now[n]the team is even more united than ever.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A new year is about to begin...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}In one month, on January 31st,[n]we will face Nyx.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We must reach the top of Tartarus by then.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This is what we've all decided.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}2009 is quietly drawing to a close.[n]It was a year filled with many memories...[n]{f 1 1}
